raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "inspirational exhortation framing personal vision and ideal as forward-looking metaphors for self-realization",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a person's vision functions as a reliable indicator of future identity",
    "an ideal operates prophetically to reveal an eventual true self",
    "self-transformation follows a teleological path disclosed by inner vision and ideal"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent through parallel syntactic and semantic pairing of vision/promise with ideal/prophecy, sustained by consistent metaphorical register",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "reader treats the lines as evocative prompts for reflection or motivation rather than literal prediction, and finds the metaphors personally resonant",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "reader interprets the statement as empirical or deterministic claim about inevitable future outcomes instead of poetic metaphor"
}
